title: Special Education Teachers, Elementary School
description: Teach academic, social, and life skills to elementary school students with learning, emotional, or physical disabilities. Includes teachers who specialize and work with students who are blind or have visual impairments; students who are deaf or have hearing impairments; and students with intellectual disabilities.

tasks.text: Instruct students with disabilities in academic subjects, using a variety of techniques, such as phonetics, multisensory learning, or repetition to reinforce learning and meet students' varying needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or implement strategies to meet the needs of students with a variety of disabilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach socially acceptable behavior, employing techniques such as behavior modification or positive reinforcement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Modify the general elementary education curriculum for students with disabilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain accurate and complete student records as required by laws, district policies, or administrative regulations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Prepare classrooms with a variety of materials or resources for children to explore, manipulate, or use in learning activities or imaginative play.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish and enforce rules for behavior and procedures for maintaining order among students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide assistive devices, supportive technology, or assistance accessing facilities, such as restrooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate placement of students with special needs into mainstream classes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe and evaluate students' performance, behavior, social development, and physical health.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Encourage students to explore learning opportunities or persevere with challenging tasks to prepare them for later grades.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with parents, administrators, testing specialists, social workers, or other professionals to develop individual educational plans (IEPs) for students' educational, physical, or social development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with parents or guardians to discuss their children's progress, advise them on using community resources, or teach skills for dealing with students' impairments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor teachers or teacher assistants to ensure adherence to special education program requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach students personal development skills, such as goal setting, independence, or self-advocacy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish and communicate clear objectives for all lessons, units, and projects to students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Guide or counsel students with adjustment problems, academic problems, or special academic interests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or conduct activities for a balanced program of instruction, demonstration, and work time that provides students with opportunities to observe, question, and investigate.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare objectives, outlines, or other materials for courses of study, following curriculum guidelines or school or state requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct students in daily living skills required for independent maintenance and self-sufficiency, such as hygiene, safety, or food preparation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other teachers or administrators to develop, evaluate, or revise elementary school programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with other staff members to plan or schedule lessons promoting learning, following approved curricula.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct and monitor students in the use and care of equipment or materials to prevent injuries and damage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare, administer, or grade tests or assignments to evaluate students' progress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Organize and display students' work in a manner appropriate for their perceptual skills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend professional meetings, educational conferences, or teacher training workshops to maintain or improve professional competence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret the results of standardized tests to determine students' strengths and areas of need.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize and supervise games or other recreational activities to promote physical, mental, or social development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer standardized ability and achievement tests to elementary students with special needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan or supervise experiential learning activities, such as class projects, field trips, demonstrations, or visits by guest speakers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
